chat_id_to_continue_generated_when_omitt: Chat ID to continue; generated when omitted
chat_id_used_for_this_request: Chat ID used for this request
files_to_send_to_sim_as_attachments: Files to send to Sim as attachments

the_sim_block_sends_messages_to_sim_whic: The Sim block sends messages to Sim, which has access to subagents, integration tools, memory, and workspace context. Use it to perform complex multi-step reasoning, cross-service queries, or any task that benefits from the full Sim intelligence within a workflow.
